Speaking

Making AI make sense from the stage

Louis brings two decades of hands-on AI product experience to every talk — from building IBM Watson Trend to founding TeleTrex. No hype, no hand-waving. Just clear, practical insight on where AI is going and how to use it now.

Past engagements

On the record

A practitioner's perspective on AI — delivered at some of the industry's most important stages.

IBM Think Conference
AI-Powered Search: How Cognitive AI Transforms Enterprise Knowledge Discovery
Keynote

Multiple sessions at IBM's flagship annual conference exploring how AI moves search beyond keyword matching — understanding intent, ranking by relevance, and surfacing knowledge that traditional search buries. Delivered to technical architects, enterprise decision-makers, and practitioners building on IBM's AI platform.

IBM Think AI / Enterprise Search Technical & business audiences
Digital Analytics Association · 2016
IBM Watson Trend — Technology of the Year
Award recognition

IBM Watson Trend, built by Louis's incubator team at IBM, received the DAA Excellence Award for Technology of the Year — recognized alongside Adobe and other top-tier innovators for its application of NLP and machine learning to consumer trend forecasting.

Digital Analytics Association AI / Consumer Intelligence Industry award gala
Topics

What Louis speaks about

Each talk is tailored to the audience — technical depth for engineering teams, strategic clarity for business leaders.

🔍
AI-Powered Search
How cognitive AI transforms information retrieval — from keyword matching to intent understanding, relevance ranking, and enterprise knowledge discovery. The talk that anchored multiple IBM Think sessions.
Keynote45–60 minTechnical or business
🤝
Human–AI Collaboration
AI doesn't replace your best people — it amplifies them. Drawing on lessons from Watson and TeleTrex, this talk explores what real human–AI partnership looks like at the product and organizational level.
Keynote / Panel30–60 minLeadership audiences
⚡
Scaling Businesses with Practical AI
Most businesses don't need a team of ML engineers — they need leverage. This talk covers the real-world playbook for deploying AI that reduces cost, accelerates response, and doesn't require a PhD to maintain.
Keynote / Workshop45–90 minSMB and enterprise
🏗️
Lessons from Building Watson
A candid account of what it takes to build award-winning AI products inside a large enterprise — what worked, what failed, and what startup founders and product teams can learn from the Watson era.
Fireside chat30–45 minProduct / founders
🖥️
GPU Computing for the Modern Web
The browser is a supercomputer most developers ignore. This technical talk explores WebGL, GPU-driven visualization, and what becomes possible when you move computation off the CPU — with live demos.
Technical keynote45 minEngineering audiences
🧭
Cutting Through the AI Hype
A grounded, pragmatic guide to evaluating AI claims, choosing vendors wisely, and building internal AI capability that lasts — designed for executives and leaders navigating a noisy market.
Executive briefing30–45 minC-suite / board

Book Louis for your next event

Available for conferences, corporate keynotes, panels, fireside chats, and private executive briefings. Louis tailors every session to the audience — no recycled slide decks. Start with a 30-minute intro call to discuss your event, audience, and goals.

Schedule intro call ↗ Connect on LinkedIn

TeleTrex — AI that scales businesses without scaling overhead
Practical AI assistants trained on how you talk to customers. Faster answers, fewer dropped balls, a lighter load on your team — built in Mountain View, CA.
